flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Jamestown Community College rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.7k → $4.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Jamestown Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Jamestown Community College fell 41% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.6k → $6.8k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Jamestown Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (47.6% → 58.4%).
